# Validation Evidence

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/validationevidence -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

Executable SSOT: [`validation.riido.json`](validation.riido.json).

Evidence artifact: `validation-evidence`.

Prove the daemon-side validation truth source, command gate, and transition mapping without claiming task FSM or security policy ownership.

## Implemented Facts

| Fact | Summary | Evidence |
| --- | --- | --- |
| agent completion is not final completion | Provider completed result moves task DB work to Validating, not Completed. | `complete-to-validating-test`, `completed-result-transition` |
| daemon measured exit code is truth source | Validation command is executed by the daemon through /bin/sh -lc and exit code maps to passed or failed. | `shell-command`, `exit-zero-passed`, `exit-nonzero-failed`, `runner-success-test`, `runner-failure-test` |
| deterministic gate defaults | Default gate is deterministic-command-exit-code.v1 and default timeout is five minutes. | `default-gate`, `default-timeout` |
| timeout is failed evidence | Validation timeout records exit code 124 and therefore failed. | `timeout-exit-code`, `nonzero-result-failed` |
| guarded evidence mutation | Validation appends guarded task evidence using command id, provider, decision LLM, and approval id. | `guarded-evidence-call`, `approval-guard-field`, `approval-required-test` |
| passed transition mapping | Passed validation from Validating appends ValidationPassed and moves to PatchReady. | `passed-transition-code`, `patch-ready-test` |
| failed transition mapping | Failed validation from Validating appends ValidationFailed and moves to Failed. | `failed-transition-code`, `failed-test` |
| non-validating tasks keep state | Validation evidence can be recorded for non-Validating tasks, but no transition is appended. | `non-validating-test` |
| local API uses same runner | The validate API delegates to taskvalidation.Run and persists the resulting task DB. | `api-run-call`, `api-save-call`, `api-validate-test`, `api-context-test` |

## Boundaries

| Boundary | Owner | Summary |
| --- | --- | --- |
| task FSM and IR catalog | riido-contracts | Task states and validation event vocabulary are imported contracts, not defined here. |
| security policy selection | C7 Security / Policy | Validation executes requested rules; it does not define protected paths, secret-scan policy, or diff policy. |
| provider runtime execution | C4 Provider Runtime | Validation runs deterministic commands and records evidence; provider process/session ownership stays outside C8. |
| final completion approval | task lifecycle and approval policy | PatchReady to Completed is outside validation's sole authority. |

## Forbidden Surfaces

| Surface | Reason |
| --- | --- |
| `validation direct completed transition` | validation must not directly mark task completion |

## Assertions

- `Validation reader doc must be generated from this manifest.`
- `Every implemented fact must point at local source evidence.`
- `Validation must not directly claim final Completed authority.`
